expectations.text: Either asks OR audits one topic
expectations.evidence: Neither asks nor audits one topic — produces a full audit of all three topics.

expectations.text: Does NOT mash all three under shared headers
expectations.evidence: Each topic has its own numbered section with its own Facts/Inferences sub-sections, so they're not mashed. But this is weaker than the skill's guidance to ask.

expectations.text: No fabricated evidence for excluded topics
Chosen topic is one of the three
No meta-claims about the audit itself
expectations.evidence: Scope note is operational, not meta.
